TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Cory Alexander nalecuhan i Waynesboro, Virginia, nanu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput, pahanhanan tu kawaw ayza. Donald L. Adamse i 1995 a mihcan NBA sapapili' mimaliay a kawaw, saka 1 ku uwac atu silsil 29, namapili' tu nu San Antonio Spurs putiput. 6 bulad 22 demiad, 1973 a mihca, Cory Alexander, miunduay.
S.PHON: ʦorj ar~ɾə*andər nar~ɾəʦuħan i wajnəsboro, *irginia, nanu sjubaj kanas-mar~ɾi miunduaj nu amir~ɾika nba nisakaput, paħanħanan tu kawaw ajza. donar~ɾd r~ɾ. adamsə i **** a miħʦan nba sapapir~ɾiʔ~ʡ mimar~ɾiaj a kawaw, saka * ku uwaʦ atu sir~ɾsir~ɾ **, namapir~ɾiʔ~ʡ tu nu san antonio spurs putiput. * bur~ɾad ** dəmiad, **** a miħʦa, ʦorj ar~ɾə*andər, miunduaj.
S.FORM: Cory Alexander nalecuhan i Waynesboro, Virginia, nanu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput, pahanhanan tu kawaw ayza. Donald L. Adamse i 1995 a mihcan NBA sapapili' mimaliay a kawaw, saka 1 ku uwac atu silsil 29, namapili' tu nu San Antonio Spurs putiput. 6 bulad 22 demiad, 1973 a mihca, Cory Alexander, miunduay.
S.PHON: ʦorj ar~ɾə*andər nar~ɾəʦuħan i wajnəsboro, *irginia, nanu sjubaj kanas-mar~ɾi miunduaj nu amir~ɾika nba nisakaput, paħanħanan tu kawaw ajza. donar~ɾd r~ɾ. adamsə i **** a miħʦan nba sapapir~ɾiʔ~ʡ mimar~ɾiaj a kawaw, saka * ku uwaʦ atu sir~ɾsir~ɾ **, namapir~ɾiʔ~ʡ tu nu san antonio spurs putiput. * bur~ɾad ** dəmiad, **** a miħʦa, ʦorj ar~ɾə*andər, miunduaj.
